title: come-back-my-villagers
description: Modify the villager mechanism to pre-1.20.1 including trading and raids
body:
This mod removes Mojang's village trading rebalance launched in 23w31a.

This mod:

- allows you to get a lower price by curing the same villager multiple times. (toggle it: `/come back cure`)
- removed raid_omen. you can start a raid with bad omen effect so the old raid farms work. (toggle it: `/come back raid`)
- for witches that are in a raid, use 1.20 loot table to avoid too many redstones. (toggle it: `/come back witchRaiderDrop`)
